title: Extension of Code to extra-territorial offences
content: The provisions of this Code apply also to any offence committed by: (1) any citizen of Pakistan or any person in the service of Pakistan in any place without and beyond Pakistan; (2) any person on any ship or aircraft registered in Pakistan wherever it may be; (3) any person in any place without and beyond Pakistan committing offence targeting a computer resource.

footnotes.text: Substituted by the Central Laws (Adaptation) Order, 1961, Art. 2 and Sch., for 'British subject of Pakistani domicile'.
